arts.ttl: Player wanted to leave West Ham in summer – Has now made firm transfer decision
arts.sum: Lucas Paqueta wants to leave West Ham United and return to Brazil, even if he is acquitted of the charges currently against him. That’s according to GOAL Brasil, who report that the midfielder wanted to leave West Ham in the summer transfer window but was blocked from doing so.
